            return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Success(__dst);
        }
        catch (global::System.Exception ex)
        {
            return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError("mapping.constructor.threw", "(root)", ex.Message));
        }
    }

        for (int i = 0; i < src.Count; i++)
        {
            var __r = TryMap(src[i]);
            if (__r.IsSuccess) __dst.Add(__r.Value);
            else __failures.Add(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError(__r.Error.Code, "[" + i + "]" + (__r.Error.PropertyPath == "(root)" ? "" : "." + __r.Error.PropertyPath), __r.Error.Reason, __r.Error.Children));
